title: Dream of being shot, numbed the feeling, tried to describe it (Nov 5 2022, week after ChatGPT-adjacent OSIG window)
html:
TL;DR

  • Single-line dream-fragment captured Saturday Nov 5, 2022 at 10:49pm: "I think that I had a dream last night that I was shot… numbed the feeling and attempted to describe it…."
  • Dropped exactly between the Ahmad Jamal junk drawer (Oct 25, the densest founder-mode note in the vault) and ChatGPT's public launch (Nov 30) — the late-fall 2022 stretch when Yahir's headspace was simultaneously expansive (founder ideas) and grim (this dream).
  • The structure of the note is the key signal: it's not the dream that Yahir captures, it's the act of numbing the feeling and trying to describe it — a meta-move that recurs across his dream-and-fragment notes (2022 04 15 riley pirate river dream, 2022 03 24 very sad dream where i was working for a company similar to).
  • One of three dated dream-notes from 2022 that together form a small "writing about the inside of dreams" corpus — Yahir's habit of treating dreams as legible artifacts rather than mood-decoration.
  • No follow-on description ever got written. The note is the entire promise: "attempted to describe it" — and stopped.

Key fragment

"I think that I had a dream last night that I was shot… numbed the feeling and attempted to describe it…."

Why it matters

The pattern across Yahir's 2022 dream notes is consistent: dream content is logged less than the dreamer's relationship to it. The shot-dream is not described; the act of trying to describe it is. The pirate river dream is preserved as a quote about the dream rather than the dream itself. The sad-job dream from March is logged at high meta-level ("a company similar to…"). This is one of the few places where a 19-year-old Yahir is doing what looks like proto-phenomenology — writing about the experience of trying to capture experience.

Open questions

  • Did the shot-dream description ever get written elsewhere (longer note, Google Doc, voice memo)?
  • The "numbed the feeling" line — is that a character description (the dream-Yahir numbed it) or an author description (waking-Yahir numbed the recall)?
  • Is there a body-stress correlate in early November 2022 — midterms, OSIG pressure — that would pattern with a violent dream?
